changeSet.author: issue-714
changeSet.comment: Replace (repository_id, number) unique constraint with (repository_id, issue_type, number) to support GitLab's separate IID namespaces for issues and merge requests.

changeSet.author: issue-714
changeSet.comment: Cleanup: drop old (repository_id, number) constraint if Hibernate ddl-auto recreated it from the stale JPA annotation.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE issue DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS uk_issue_repository_number;

rollback.sql: -- No-op: the old constraint should not be restored
